params.isContract: whether the address is a contract
params.name: the name of the address

params.isContract: whether the address is a contract
params.name: the name of the address

params.isContract: whether the address is a contract
params.name: the name of the address

params.isContract: whether the address is a contract
params.name: the name of the address

_addresses(string,uint256).notice: mapping from contract name to network chain id to address

addAddress(string,address,bool).notice: add an address for the current chainId

addAddress(string,address,uint256,bool).notice: add an address for a specific chainId

borrowCaps(uint256).notice: borrow caps of all hTokens that were added to the market with this proposal

changeAddress(string,address,bool).notice: change an address for the current chainId

changeAddress(string,address,uint256,boo.notice: change an address for a specific chainId

emissions(uint256,uint256).notice: mapping of all emission configs per chainid

getAddress(string).notice: get an address for the current chainId

getAddress(string,uint256).notice: get an address for a specific chainId

getChangedAddresses().notice: get changed addresses from a proposal's deployment

getRecordedAddresses().notice: get recorded addresses from a proposal's deployment

hTokens(uint256).notice: list of all hTokens that were added to the market with this proposal

isAddressContract(string).notice: check if an address is a contract

isAddressSet(string).notice: check if an address is set

isAddressSet(string,uint256).notice: check if an address is set for a specific chain id

supplyCaps(uint256).notice: supply caps of all hTokens that were added to the market with this proposal
